extract: Melmetal (Japanese: メルメタル Melmetal) is a Steel-type Mythical Pokémon introduced in Generation VII. It first appeared in Pokémon GO and later made its core series debut in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. In Pokémon GO, it evolves from Meltan when the player uses 400 Meltan Candy. Meltan cannot evolve in the core series games. Melmetal can Gigantamax into Gigantamax Melmetal if it has the Gigantamax Factor. Gigantamax Melmetal debuted with the release of Pokémon GO transfer compatibility with Pokémon HOME. Melmetal was officially revealed on October 24, 2018. It is the last Pokémon in the Kanto Pokédex in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!.
